title: Sacramento, CA

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California has the highest electricity rates in the nation.",
    "Assembly Bill 2054 imposes a 10-year cooling-off period for commissioners at the CPUC and CEC.",
    "The cooling-off period aims to curb the revolving door between regulators and the utility industry.",
    "AB 2054 seeks to insulate regulators from conflicts of interest.",
    "The measure is intended to reduce the undue influence of regulated industries on regulatory bodies.",
    "The proposed cooling-off period protects the independence of rate-regulators.",
    "The cooling-off period alleviates pressure to approve unnecessary rate increases.",
    "AB 2054 aims to restore faith in the regulatory process."
  ]
}
```
